title: oncoba subtomentosa
intro: Oncoba subtomentosa, also known as the African ironplow tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Oncoba subtomentosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional African medicine.
